properties.name: group
properties.title: Group
properties.description: Required workgroup number (1, 2, …). Sets unique service names activity-38-gN-vprn / …-vpls and IDs 501+(N-1)*100 and 601+(N-1)*100.

properties.name: operation
properties.title: Operation
properties.description: Configure pushes VPRN/VPLS to devices; remove deletes the matching service instances for this group and scope.

properties.name: plan
properties.title: Plan
properties.description: If true, dry run only — no PATCH or DELETE is sent; workflow outputs plan_detail with what would be done.

properties.name: service_scope
properties.title: Service Scope
properties.description: all = one VPRN and one VPLS per targeted PE; vprn_only or vpls_only limits to that service type.

properties.name: node_scope
properties.title: Node Scope
properties.description: Which PE(s) to target: names must match g<group>-pe1 / g<group>-pe2 (e.g. g1-pe1 for group 1).
